name: YG-Auditors
arabicLegalName: مكتب يوسف أحمد جلال - المحاسب القانوني

description.en: YG-Auditors is a professional accounting and consultancy firm founded in 2015, offering a comprehensive range of financial services. We serve individuals, businesses, and non-profit organizations across Egypt with the highest professional standards.
description.ar: تأسس مكتب يوسف أحمد جلال - المحاسب القانوني - عام 2015 بغرض تقديم مجموعة متكاملة من الخدمات المحاسبية والاستشارية للأفراد والشركات والمنظمات غير الربحية في مصر.

mission: To provide our clients with a full range of high-quality financial services, combining professional expertise with personalized attention.
vision: To be the most trusted accounting and auditing firm in Egypt, known for integrity, professionalism, and client satisfaction.
